title: 理论性能计算
raw_content:
理论性能计算
矩阵参数：·
C = A * B




left matrix (A)

right matrix(B)

output matrix(C)



(M, K)

(K, N)

(M, N)

每个spc计算的数据量

（mPerSpc, kPerSpc)

(kPerSpc, nPerSpc)

(mPerSpc, nPerSpc)
硬件参数：


硬件带宽

数据

UMA_BW

30

NUMA_BW

40

GMB_BW(BF16)

256

NUMA_L2_BW(all hit)

256

DTG_BW

60

Tcore算力（mac)

8192 (FP32)
16384 (BF16)
32768 (s8)
各阶段计算：


阶段

公式



reload_a_hbm_to_gib

根据具体Tiling策略



reload_a_hbm_to_gmb

根据具体Tiling策略



reload_b_hbm_to_gmb

根据具体Tiling策略



reload_b_gmb_to_gib

根据具体Tiling策略



Load A from HBM to GIB

( mPerSpc * kPerSpc * reload_a_hbm_to_gib * TypeA ) / a_load_hbm_to_gib_bw



Load A from HBM to GMB

( mPerSpc * kPerSpc * reload_a_hbm_to_gmb * TypeA) / a_load_hbm_to_gmb_bw



Write C (workspace is NUMA, size <= 4MB, hit rate <= 50%)

(mPerSpc * nPerSpc * TypeC * (kPerSpc / inPartitionK) ) / （NUMA_L2_BW * 50%）
(kPerSpc / inPartitionK) 表示对K维度切分了多少次，即多少次k输出到L2



gemm

( mPerSpc * kPerSpc * nPerSpc ) /  Tcore



最终结果

(1)
A：HBM----> GIB
B：HBM-→GMB -→GIB
max( Load_A_From_HBM_To_GIB , Load_B_From_GMB_to_GIB , Gemm , Write_C) + Load_B_From_HBM_To_GMB
(2)
A: HBM-→GIB
B: HBM-→GIB
max( Load_A_From_HBM_To_GIB + Load_B_From_HBM_To_GIB , Gemm , write_C )




Example:
0df1b3b1-e88e-46d9-a376-98c1cb24a626.png

假设:
右矩阵B NUMA 放入 GMB,
左矩阵A UMA使用DTG,
数据类型均为BF16。
C的计算顺序如图所示，各参数配置如下：
mPerSpc = 4096
nPerSpc = 1024
kPerSpc = 4096
GMB 使用大小为：outK x outN x size(TypeB)
outPartitionM = 1024
outPartitiionK = 1024
outPartitionN = 1024
inPartitionM = 256
inPartitionK = 512
inPartitionN = 256
代码中循环顺序为:
 

 展开源码 
loadGmb = []{
for(outN; outN < nPerSpc; outN += outPartitionN)
  for(outM; outM < mPerSpc; outM += outPartitionM)
                for(outK; outK < kPerSpc; outK += outPartitionK)
                        Load_B_From_Hbm_To_Gmb()
                        
                        // send signal to mma: the load gmb data is ok
                        sem_post();
};

mma = []{ 
for(outN; outN < nPerSpc; outN += outPartitionN)  
        for(outM; outM < mPerSpc; outM += outPartitionM)
                for(outK; outK < kPerSpc; outK += outPartitionK)
                        
                        // wait signal from loadGmb: gmb data ready
                        sem_wait();

                        Load_B_From_Gmb_To_Bbuffer();
                        Load_A_From_Hbm_To_Abuffer();
                        doMMA()
};








reload_a_hbm_to_gib

1 （由代码循环可以看出，A仅需load 1 次）



reload_b_hbm_to_gmb

mPerSpc / outM  =   4 （由代码循环可以看出，假设每次load ( outPartitionK, outPartitionN ）大小的数据到GMB，B 需要 load mPerSpc / outPartitionM 次



reload_b_gmb_to_gib

 outPartitionM / inPartitionM = 4 （在这个例子中，对gmb中的数据没有复用，对load到GMB中的数据仅使用 1 次）



Load A from HBM to GIB

( 1024 * 2048 *  1 * 2) / 60



Load B from HBM to GMB

( 2048 * 1024 *  4  * 2) / 40



Load B from GMB to GIB

( 2048 * 1024 * 4 * 2) / 256



Write C to L2

(1024 * 2048 * 2) / 256



gemm

( 1024 * 2048 * 1024 ) /  16384



最终结果

max( Load_A_From_HBM_To_GIB,  Load_B_From_GMB_to_GIB ， Gemm ) + Load_B_From_HBM_To_GMB + Write_C_To_GIB

Load A from HBM to GIB

( mPerSpc * kPerSpc * reload_a_hbm_to_gib * TypeA ) / a_load_hbm_to_gib_bw

( mPerSpc * kPerSpc * reload_a_hbm_to_gmb * TypeA) / a_load_hbm_to_gmb_bw

 

Write C (workspace is NUMA, size <= 4MB, hit rate <= 50%)

(mPerSpc * nPerSpc * TypeC * (kPerSpc / inPartitionK) ) / （NUMA_L2_BW * 50%）

(kPerSpc / inPartitionK) 表示对K维度切分了多少次，即多少次k输出到L2

 

gemm

( mPerSpc * kPerSpc * nPerSpc ) /  Tcore

 

最终结果

(1)

A：HBM----> GIB

B：HBM-→GMB -→GIB

max( Load_A_From_HBM_To_GIB , Load_B_From_GMB_to_GIB , Gemm , Write_C) + Load_B_From_HBM_To_GMB

(2)

A: HBM-→GIB

B: HBM-→GIB

max( Load_A_From_HBM_To_GIB + Load_B_From_HBM_To_GIB , Gemm , write_C )

 

 

 

Example:

假设:

右矩阵B NUMA 放入 GMB,

左矩阵A UMA使用DTG,

数据类型均为BF16。

C的计算顺序如图所示，各参数配置如下：

  • mPerSpc = 4096
  • nPerSpc = 1024
  • kPerSpc = 4096
  • GMB 使用大小为：outK x outN x size(TypeB)
  • outPartitionM = 1024
  • outPartitiionK = 1024
  • outPartitionN = 1024
  • inPartitionM = 256
  • inPartitionK = 512
  • inPartitionN = 256
  • 代码中循环顺序为:
    展开源码 
    loadGmb = []{
for(outN; outN < nPerSpc; outN += outPartitionN)
  for(outM; outM < mPerSpc; outM += outPartitionM)
                for(outK; outK < kPerSpc; outK += outPartitionK)
                        Load_B_From_Hbm_To_Gmb()
                        
                        // send signal to mma: the load gmb data is ok
                        sem_post();
};

mma = []{ 
for(outN; outN < nPerSpc; outN += outPartitionN)  
        for(outM; outM < mPerSpc; outM += outPartitionM)
                for(outK; outK < kPerSpc; outK += outPartitionK)
                        
                        // wait signal from loadGmb: gmb data ready
                        sem_wait();

                        Load_B_From_Gmb_To_Bbuffer();
                        Load_A_From_Hbm_To_Abuffer();
                        doMMA()
};

 

 

 

reload_a_hbm_to_gib

1 （由代码循环可以看出，A仅需load 1 次）

 

reload_b_hbm_to_gmb

mPerSpc / outM  =   4 （由代码循环可以看出，假设每次load ( outPartitionK, outPartitionN ）大小的数据到GMB，B 需要 load mPerSpc / outPartitionM 次

 

reload_b_gmb_to_gib

 outPartitionM / inPartitionM = 4 （在这个例子中，对gmb中的数据没有复用，对load到GMB中的数据仅使用 1 次）

 

Load A from HBM to GIB

( 1024 * 2048 *  1 * 2) / 60

 

Load B from HBM to GMB

( 2048 * 1024 *  4  * 2) / 40

 

Load B from GMB to GIB

( 2048 * 1024 * 4 * 2) / 256

 

Write C to L2

(1024 * 2048 * 2) / 256

 

gemm

( 1024 * 2048 * 1024 ) /  16384

 

最终结果

max( Load_A_From_HBM_To_GIB,  Load_B_From_GMB_to_GIB ， Gemm ) + Load_B_From_HBM_To_GMB + Write_C_To_GIB
